org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network

    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
 class NetworkMessageTransportService.RemoteKernelListener
extends Object
implements Runnable
    Component that treat messages arriving form another kernel.

    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>
